updates.title: February 2025 - Monthly Update
updates.description: This month I focused on portfolio rebuild with modern tech stack, implemented Mandi and Bharat Setu projects, and enhanced my DevOps skills with Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines.

updates.title: Gold Medalist - DPU 2024
updates.description: Awarded Gold Medal for academic excellence in Bachelor of Computer Application with 7.80 CGPA and first class with distinction.

updates.title: January 2025 - Monthly Update
updates.description: Started the year with learning advanced Kubernetes concepts, completed AWS certification preparation, and contributed to open-source projects.

updates.title: Joined Perforce as DevOps Engineer
updates.description: Started my journey as a DevOps Engineer at Perforce, specializing in full-scale CI/CD, Kubernetes, and automation infrastructure.
